name: Thomson Reuters Corporation
description: Thomson Reuters Corporation is a global content and technology company that provides specialized information, software, and tools for professionals in the legal, tax, accounting, and compliance sectors. The company operates through several segments, including Legal Professionals, Tax & Accounting Professionals, and Corporates, while also owning the Reuters news agency. By integrating authoritative content with innovative technology, such as artificial intelligence and cloud-based solutions, Thomson Reuters enables its customers to make informed decisions and streamline complex workflows in an increasingly data-driven professional environment.
